                            PTDP - PTerm Demo Program


 INFO  This animation was generated with the latest version of PTerm!
       PTerm works on nearly every terminal and operating system.
       It's super easy to use!
       If you want, you can customize everything :)
       You can see the code of this demo in the ./_examples/demo directory.

       This demo was updated at: 02 May 2026 - 21:31:08 UTC

▀  Waiting for 15 seconds...

                                      Themes


 INFO  You can change the color theme of PTerm easily to fit your needs!
       This is the default one:
DefaultText
PrimaryStyle
SecondaryStyle
HighlightStyle
InfoMessageStyle
InfoPrefixStyle
SuccessMessageStyle
SuccessPrefixStyle
WarningMessageStyle
WarningPrefixStyle
ErrorMessageStyle
ErrorPrefixStyle
FatalMessageStyle
